title: stylidium rosulatum
intro: Stylidium rosulatum, also known as the hairy trigger plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Stylidiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Stylidium rosulatum are believed to include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting antiviral and antibacterial properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are typically dried and used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
